_template_note: This is the PUBLIC schema template for private holdout packs. It contains NO actual teacher-only content. Copy this to benchmarks/private-holdout-pack/holdout-manifest.json and fill in real episodes locally.

meta.honesty_note: This pack contains teacher-only evaluation material. It is not a sealed certification exam. It is a local holdout evaluation path for honest teacher-only scoring.

intended_use: iteration delta measurement on sealed material

refresh_metadata._instructions: Track weekly refresh cycles here. Each entry records what changed without exposing holdout content. The receipt schema is at data/curriculum/frontend-product-engineer-private-holdout-refresh-receipt.schema.v1.json.

episodes._instructions: Replace this placeholder with real teacher-only episodes. Each episode needs: id, family_id, title, teacher_prompt, scoring_rubric, difficulty, tags. Author FRESH wording — do not copy from the repo-visible h1/h2/h3 descriptions.
episodes.title: REPLACE-ME
